theme: Data Integration, API Client and Concurrency

sessions.description: Designed DTOs for DnD5e API integration
Implemented API client with dependency injection
Created service layer using ExecutorService and Callable
Wrote unit tests for business logic

goals: Use ExecutorService for parallel data fetching
decisionsMade: Client handles only HTTP and JSON mapping
Injected ObjectMapper instead of instantiating internally
Placed concurrency logic in service layer
Avoided real HTTP calls in unit tests
workCompleted: Implemented Dnd5eClient with list and detail methods
challenges: Keeping concurrency aligned with course material
Preventing HTTP dependency in unit tests
solutions: Used ExecutorService instead of CompletableFuture chains
reflection: Separating HTTP logic from business logic improved clarity and maintainability. The current design supports future persistence and expansion.
